text.title: PM Certification Alignment 2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (exam_date, methodology_count, certification_body) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: library too small — focus on coverage growth first

text.example: exam_date_after_2026_07_01=true → methodology_count=130 → apply full alignment rubric (rule eco-mapping-explicit).
